skills.name: Free Meal Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Free Meal skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Free Meal skill.

skills.name: Attack Boost
skills.description: Increases attack power. Also improves affinity at higher levels.

skills.name: Free Meal
skills.description: Gives you a predetermined chance of consuming a food or drink item for free.

skills.name: Attack Boost
skills.description: Increases attack power. Also improves affinity at higher levels.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Health Boost
skills.description: Increases health.

skills.name: Attack Boost
skills.description: Increases attack power. Also improves affinity at higher levels.

skills.name: Recovery Up
skills.description: Increases the amount recovered when restoring health.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Agitator
skills.description: Increases attack power and affinity when large monsters become enraged.

levels.description: While active, grants attack +4 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +8 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +12 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +16 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +20 and increases affinity by 10%.
While active, grants attack +24 and increases affinity by 15%.
While active, grants attack +28 and increases affinity by 20%.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.

Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.
